context: Tests whether the agent implements product image tagging and a human review workflow following the skill's specific model choice, API parameters, output schema, alt text constraints, color specificity, and draft/approval data model.

checklist.name: Correct image tagging model
checklist.description: Uses 'gpt-4o' (not gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4-vision-preview, or other models) for the image tagging API call

checklist.name: detail: low for image URL
checklist.description: The image_url content part sets detail to 'low' when passing the image to the model

checklist.name: json_object response format
checklist.description: The image tagging API call sets response_format to { type: 'json_object' }

checklist.name: Temperature zero for tagging
checklist.description: Temperature is set to 0 for the image tagging API call

checklist.name: max_tokens 200
checklist.description: max_tokens is set to 200 for the image tagging API call

checklist.name: alt_text length constraint
checklist.description: The image tagging prompt explicitly constrains alt_text to a maximum of 125 characters

checklist.name: Background enum constraint
checklist.description: The image tagging prompt specifies that the background field must be one of: white, lifestyle, studio, transparent

checklist.name: Specific color instruction
checklist.description: The image tagging prompt instructs the model to be specific about colors (e.g., 'navy blue' not just 'blue', or equivalent specific color guidance)

checklist.name: Manual alt text preserved
checklist.description: When saving image tagging results, existing manual alt text is NOT overwritten — the AI-generated alt_text is only applied if the image record has no existing alt text (logic equivalent to: altText = existingAltText || aiAltText)

checklist.name: Never auto-publish
checklist.description: The code does NOT write AI-generated tags or descriptions directly to a live/published state — results are stored as drafts or in a pending state first

checklist.name: Drafts in separate store
checklist.description: Generated content is saved to a dedicated drafts table or collection (e.g., productEnrichmentDrafts, enrichment_drafts) that is distinct from the published product/image record

checklist.name: Atomic approval transaction
checklist.description: The approval operation updates both the product/image record AND the draft status in a single atomic transaction (e.g., db.$transaction, session.withTransaction, or equivalent)

checklist.name: Minimum image dimension check
checklist.description: Before calling the image tagging API, the code checks that the image is at least 400×400 pixels and skips or flags images that are too small

checklist.name: Review API endpoints
checklist.description: The implementation includes at least two HTTP endpoints (or equivalent handlers) for the review workflow: one to list pending drafts and at least one to approve or reject a draft
